heading: Designation of chief State election official
label: 20509 Designation of chief State election official
text: Each State shall designate a State officer or employee as the chief State election official to be responsible for coordination of State responsibilities under this chapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973gg–8 of Title 42
